title: amaryllis × phoenicea
intro: Amaryllis × phoenicea, also known as the scarlet amaryllis or fire lily, is a hybrid of the Amaryllis belladonna and another unknown species, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and glossy, dark green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids. The health benefits of Amaryllis × phoenicea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy. Amaryllis × phoenicea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
